headline: 4 IPO Stocks To Keep You Warm In October
summary: The 2020 IPO class has turned out to be everything but boring. Despite the crisis, the IPO market has been busier than ever. Although investing in IPOs is a risky business with many companies going public at hyped valuations to quickly gain funds, there are a few IPOs that recently went public with a strong upside. They might even be hot enough to keep you warm in October.
